User.title: User
User.description: User profile with login and joining details.

createdAt.description: The exact timestamp when the user first signed up.

lastLoginAt.description: The timestamp of the user's last login.

Prompt.title: Prompt
Prompt.description: An image-to-text prompt generated by the user using the Gemini API.

userId.description: The UID of the user who generated this prompt.

promptType.description: The selected generator style (descriptive, recreation, artistic, minimalist).

customInstructions.description: Any custom instructions provided for the generator.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the prompt was generated.

/users/{userId}.description: Stores user profiles containing joining dates and metadata.

/users/{userId}/prompts/{promptId}.description: Subcollection storing the user's generated prompt history.
